name: codeforge-design
description: codeforge ζ arc Design lane plugin — ArchitectPLAgent + ArchitectAgent (chief author, Opus multi-source synthesizer) + 7 permanent SubAgent (SecurityArch · InfraOperationalArch · TestContractArch · DataArch · ModuleArch · AggregateArch · APIContractArch) + 3+1 CONDITIONAL SubAgent (LiveOps · LiveOrdering · ProductionEvidence + AggregateArch applicability P2) + 3 4-tuple sub-tuple component (CodebaseMapper · Refactor · ArchitectAnalyst — flat spawn, deputy 아님). Change Plan + ADR templates owned. Story §3 (code module-level + aggregate + API + 빅데이터 OLAP) / §7 (incl. §7.4 운영리스크) / §8 (incl. §8.5 stateful + §8.6 contract testing) / §11 데이터 마이그레이션 (RDB OLTP AggregateArch primary / 빅데이터 OLAP DataArch primary, incl. §11.6 idempotency AggregateArch primary) / §13 production evidence quad mirror self-write. codeforge core 의존. + CFP-1086 (2026-05-20) — BackendArchEpic Phase 2 design lane 7+3+1 roster 재편 atomic activation: AggregateArchitect 신설 (Sonnet single-mandate — RDB OLTP aggregate invariant + 트랜잭션 경계 + persistence-bound + Alembic 정책 7 원칙 + CONDITIONAL applicability P2 project.yaml aggregate_arch.applicable); APIContractArchitect 신설 (Sonnet single-mandate skeleton at S1 / body 심화 S2 — REST/GraphQL/gRPC/WebSocket + DTO + OpenAPI/GraphQL + contract testing); CodeArchitect → ModuleArchitect rename + mandate 정정 (axis 명확화 — module/package boundary + dependency direction + DDD bounded context module placement 만, 도메인 모델 invariant 영역 AggregateArch 분리); DataArchitect mandate 축소 (RDB OLTP 영역 제거 → 빅데이터 OLAP only: Parquet/객체저장소/DuckDB/streaming/백필/시계열 집계); chief tie-break ladder 3 단계 (ADR-068 Amendment 2 — RACI lookup → ADR-068 invariant → chief judgement + ADR Amendment 발의); Deputy 신설 결정 framework P7 (ADR-086 신설 — axis 분석 + 5-checklist + deferred carrier path). ADR-042 Amendment 8 + ADR-068 Amendment 2 + ADR-086 cross-repo sibling sync. + CFP-1026 S3 (2026-05-20) — design lane agent 구조 재편 atomic activation: DataMigrationArchitect → DataArchitect rename + mandate 확장 (§3 data + §11 전체); OperationalRiskArchitect → InfraOperationalArchitect rename (§7.4 primary 6-sub, ProductionEvidence disjoint axis); CodeArchitect 신설 (Sonnet, §3 code single-mandate advocacy); ArchitectAnalyst 신설 (Sonnet, 4-tuple sub-tuple component, PriorArtAgent conceptual rename); ProductionEvidenceDeputy 신설 (CONDITIONAL production cutover, ADR-72). ADR-042 Amendment 7 + ADR-014 Amendment 4 + ADR-72 cross-repo sibling sync.
